lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is well-maintained. All mechanical components are functional and the vehicle runs well.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and small rust spots. The interior shows moderate wear, including minor stains and thinning upholstery. All mechanical systems are currently operational, though the vehicle shows signs of regular use and age.

Step into luxury with this absolutely stunning vehicle that looks like it just rolled off the factory floor! This car is in truly mint condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that still feels brand new. It has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and meticulously cared for, ensuring it performs as perfectly as it looks. If you're looking for a vehicle in pristine, showroom quality, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine starts reliably and runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts without issue. The exterior is generally clean, though there are minor cosmetic blemishes such as small stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the interior is well-kept with minimal wear on the upholstery, and all electrical components and features are fully functional. This is a solid, dependable car that is ready for daily use with no immediate mechanical work required.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows visible signs of its age and mileage. While it remains functional and is currently used as a daily driver, it will require mechanical and cosmetic attention in the near future. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and the clear coat is beginning to fade on the hood. Inside, the upholstery exhibits significant wear and tear, and the air conditioning system is not operating at full capacity. Mechanically, the car runs and shifts, but the suspension feels loose and a thorough service is recommended. This is an honest option for a buyer looking for a budget-friendly vehicle who is willing to invest in some repairs.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit has undergone a comprehensive professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. It offers a sophisticated driving experience with a proven track record of reliability and represents an excellent value proposition within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting with my trusty ride and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, well-loved, and totally ready to hit the road for its next big adventure. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great and runs smooth, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs strong. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle presents a wonderful opportunity for a driver seeking reliability and comfort. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, with only minor, expected road wear such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is free of tears, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It features a smooth-shifting transmission, a responsive engine, and a set of tires with significant tread life remaining. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring this car is road-ready from day one. It offers a quiet, composed ride that reflects its careful ownership history.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this remains an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber motorcar.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking dependable luxury and enduring value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been loved and well-cared for? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's still got so much life left in it! It runs great and looks fantastic—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. I've really enjoyed every mile in this beauty, but it's time for it to find a new home. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving linear power through individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery out of corners. Chassis integrity is maintained with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings throughout. Suspension geometry remains sharp via the original MacPherson front and multi-link rear setup. This example has been meticulously serviced, showing strong compression across all cylinders and a clean oil analysis. A driver-focused machine ready for the canyons or the track.
Well-maintained used car. Good condition. Regular service history. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven performance and sophisticated engineering. Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that’s been really well-taken care of? I’m parting with my favorite car, and it’s still in wonderful shape and drives like a dream! It’s perfect for weekend road trips or just getting around town with ease. I’ve loved every mile in it, and I know you will too. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for optimal volumetric efficiency. The drivetrain remains robust with a factory limited-slip differential and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and comprehensive subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. With its balanced weight distribution and McPherson strut front/multi-link rear suspension, this chassis offers precise turn-in and exceptional mechanical grip. A mechanically sound, driver-focused example of a modern classic.
Good condition. Clean title. Regularly serviced. Reliable performance. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is in impressive mechanical condition and has been meticulously maintained, offering a reliable and spirited driving experience. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, age-appropriate character marks that are barely noticeable. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh fluid service, and a professional detail. It drives straight and true, providing a smooth, quiet ride that reflects its careful ownership history. This is a turnkey car ready for its next journey, balancing premium features with excellent long-term value.

Presented in well-maintained condition, this vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Regular maintenance records included. Minor exterior wear.

Presented in a striking Midnight Sapphire finish, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition. The exterior retains a deep luster, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin features supple charcoal leather seating with minimal wear on the bolsters, and the original premium carpet mats are included. Every technological feature, from the responsive touchscreen navigation to the surround-sound audio system, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust; it has a documented history of on-time oil changes and scheduled maintenance, ensuring the engine and transmission perform seamlessly. The suspension provides a quiet, composed ride, and the performance tires have plenty of life left for the seasons ahead. This is a reliable, well-cared-for example perfect for a discerning driver who values both performance and presentation.

This vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning driver, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated performance. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, this model offers a seamless driving experience backed by a comprehensive service history. It serves as an exemplary investment for those seeking a harmonious blend of reliability and prestige.
